title: CancelChat Fabric
body:
# CancelChat

Prevent chat messages sent by players from appearing to other players.

## Players

This mod should not be installed on the client. Players do not need it.

## Standalone servers

This mod could technically be used to disable the chat on standalone Fabric servers — but messages will still be sent to the server console. This may be useful if a mod relies on chat input for data entry.

## Proxies (Bungeecord, Velocity, etc.)

This mod is intended to be installed on your **backend Fabric** servers. It prevents messages from being broadcast to other players, but still allows the message to be processed by the server.

It is intended for situations where a chat handling plugin (i.e. [HuskChat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/huskchat)) is used on your proxy, but you still need messages to be passed through to your backend server, e.g. for [Discord Integration](https://modrinth.com/plugin/dcintegration).

For Spigot servers, see [this plugin]([https://github.com/WiIIiam278/CancelChat](https://github.com/WiIIiam278/CancelChat)).
